## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why it belongs in Forest Agent Dashboard.

## Privacy and network impact

- [ ] No real vault, mailbox, address, token, authorization code, OAuth response, or personal screenshot is included.
- [ ] New or changed network behavior is documented in `PRIVACY.md`.
- [ ] Credentials remain in secure storage.

## Interface quality

- [ ] Keyboard focus and narrow panes were checked.
- [ ] Light and dark themes were checked.
- [ ] Reduced-motion behavior was checked when motion changed.
- [ ] Demo data and assets are synthetic and properly licensed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] Relevant manual Obsidian checks

## Screenshots

Use synthetic data only, or write “Not applicable.”
